'''Kaer''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Siskeen system/Legends|Siskeen system]] of the [[Hunnoverrs sector/Legends|Hunnoverrs sector]].

==History==
The [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] built the [[Kaer Orbital Platform]] at the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the Clone Wars, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] used the base for constructing more [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Battle droid/Legends|troops]] and vehicles.<ref name="GB:CC" />

[[Kaer Station]], a [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas mining platform was constructed in its skies, but was later taken over by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization and used as a base for [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Lun Rask]] in [[137 ABY]].<ref name="SW:L37" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kaer was first mentioned in the databank of the game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''. In [[Legacy (2006) 37|''Legacy'' (2006) 37]], Kaer in [[Siskeen system/Legends|Siskeen system]] was misplaced to [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]].

The level in ''Clone Campaigns'' was designed by [[Lily Mansfield]], who chose the name ''Kaer'' as a variation of the [[Wikipedia:Welsh language|Welsh]] word ''caer'', meaning fortress.<ref name="Interview">{{OfficialYouTube|channel=UCTTkrDBu5zBaqaJ1TiOziZQ|name=Wookieepedia|video=J1w3DCX2H7E|text=A Conversation with Lily Mansfield}}</ref>
